steps.title: Identify the sentence type
steps.content: The sentence describes a historical fact about when a time period came to be known as the Reconstruction era—it's a statement, not a question.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: A and C end with question marks, which are inappropriate for a statement. Between B and D, choice B is correct because the relative pronoun “which” already provides the subject, so adding “it” (in D) violates standard grammar. That matches choice B — B is correct.
